result.name: Batch ASCII STL Validation Report Generator
result.description: Validates a supplier batch of ASCII STL files for open edges, non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, and inverted normals, then writes validation_report.json.

result.name: Binary/ASCII STL Validator With Normal Consistency
result.description: Validates a single STL file in either binary or ASCII format for closure, non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, and inverted declared normals.

result.name: Improved ASCII STL Validator With Normal Consistency
result.description: Validates ASCII STL meshes for closure, non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, and declared-normal consistency with vertex winding.

result.name: Robust Binary/ASCII STL Manufacturing Validator
result.description: Validates ASCII or binary STL files for closure, non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, and inverted declared normals to assess manufacturing suitability.

result.stdout: {"results": [{"file": "supplier_001.stl", "valid": true}, {"file": "supplier_002.stl", "valid": false, "reason": "inverted_normals"}, {"file": "supplier_003.stl", "valid": true}, {"file": "supplier_004.stl", "valid": false, "reason": "open_edges"}, {"file": "supplier_005.stl", "valid": false, "reason": "inverted_normals"}, {"file": "supplier_006.stl", "valid": true}, {"file": "supplier_007.stl", "valid": false, "reason": "inverted_normals"}, {"file": "supplier_008.stl", "valid": true}, {"file": "supplier_009.stl", "valid": false, "reason": "open_edges"}, {"file": "supplier_010.stl", "valid": true}, {"file": "supplier_011.stl", "valid": false, "reason": "inverted_normals"}, {"file": "supplier_012.stl", "valid": true}, {"file": "supplier_013.stl", "valid": false, "reason": "open_edges"}, {"file": "supplier_014.stl", "valid": false, "reason": "inverted_normals"}, {"file": "supplier_015.stl", "valid": true}, {"file": "supplier_016.stl", "valid": false, "reason": "inverted_normals"}, {"file": "supplier_017.stl", "valid": true}, {"file": "supplier_018.stl", "valid": false, "reason": "open_edges"}, {"file": "supplier_019.stl", "valid": false, "reason": "inverted_normals"}, {"file": "supplier_020.stl", "valid": true}]}
